subject: Re: nina
body:
definitely come to new york

----- Original Message ----
From: nina . <nina-mel@mail.ru>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, March 20, 2007 3:49:35 AM
Subject: nina


hi Jeffrey! 
did you get my letter a couple of days ago? 
in case you didn't,i was asking if i can come april 1st for 2weeks... 
but if you're busy or don't want or whatever reasons,maybe you can  let me know -so i could know that i shouldn't count on that flat and started looking for other place where to stay,as it's not many days till 1st april...also i'm going to pick up tickets on friday,and before that,just wanted to conciliate it's dates with you and adjust these dates(1st till 15th april) according to apartment's availability and your presence in town :) 
but if i won't here from you till friday,then will have these dates set,cos i was also thinking of several painting classes to be taken at this time.
so,you know anyway when i'm in nyc,-and in case you'll want to meet up,you can reach me by my cell phone-Sarah has it.hope they didn't cancel my sim card yet. 
and if i won't have a chance to see you this time in nyc,then hello to all the girls,especially to Tatiana,and to everyone else!!
and hello to you from Katia, she was thinking of coming also,though already don't know,and you know her,she's never 100% sure and needs to be convinced all the time!:))but hope she will be able to make it with me,would be much more fun!
p.s. i'm going to do a professional photoshoot with a new hair color in nyc. will be seeing irina there,and will leave her few of these pics-so she could show you after ;))
kiss and hug you! be well!!
Nina


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
